name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: 6225 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA: PLS Check Cashers provides 24-hour check cashing services.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers is located at 6225 S Figueroa St in Los Angeles, CA, in a standalone storefront convenient to the South Los Angeles community. This location operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, making it accessible whenever you need check cashing services. The South Los Angeles branch of PLS Check Cashers is designed for quick, efficient transactions without long wait times.

At this Los Angeles location, PLS Check Cashers offers check cashing for personal and business checks, with competitive rates and minimal fees. Call 213-394-8914 to confirm current services or get answers to your specific check cashing needs. The staff at 6225 S Figueroa St are trained to handle various check types quickly and securely.

When visiting the Los Angeles check cashing location on S Figueroa St, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check—processing is typically completed in minutes. PLS Check Cashers focuses on providing accessible financial services to Los Angeles residents and communities that need alternatives to traditional banking.
address: 6225 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA 90003

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee applicable — PLS is a transaction-fee-based walk-in services business, not a subscription or product company.

certifications: State-licensed check casher (NMLS, varies by state)

pros: Founded in 1997 — 25+ years operating in alternative financial services
200+ locations across 12 states with neighborhood-level access in underserved communities
Many locations operate extended or 24-hour hours under the PLS 247 brand
No bank account required for any service
International money transfers available via Ria Money Transfer partnership
Prepaid Xpectations!® Plus Debit Card with Green Dot partnership enables direct deposit and card management
PLS Mobile app supports remote check deposit, card freeze/unfreeze, and balance tracking on iOS and Android
cons: Check cashing fees (reported ~1% + $1) are a recurring cost that adds up versus free bank or credit union alternatives
Payday and installment loan rates vary by state and can carry high APRs — not disclosed transparently online
BBB rating varies by individual store location rather than a single corporate rating — quality may differ by branch
Only available in 12 states — not a national option
No credit-building, savings, or financial planning products — purely transactional
best_for: Unbanked individuals who need to cash payroll or government checks immediately
Underbanked consumers who need bill pay, money orders, or international transfers without a bank account
Customers who need financial services during evenings, weekends, or overnight when banks are closed
Prepaid card users seeking a network with in-person cash loading and account management support
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best suited for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need reliable, immediate access to cash from checks or who require walk-in financial services — especially outside standard banking hours. The main caveat is cost: transaction fees and potential payday loan APRs make PLS a convenience product, not a cost-saving one, and consumers with bank accounts will almost always find cheaper alternatives for the same services.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government, personal, tax refund checks)
International money transfers via Ria Money Transfer
Prepaid debit cards — Xpectations!® Plus Debit Card (Green Dot)
Payday and installment loans (select states via PLS Financial Services)
Vehicle license and registration services (select locations)
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 6225 S Figueroa St, Los Angeles, CA. 24-hour check cashing with fast processing and low fees.
